zh.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow於1428年出生在英國倫敦。她於1450年與Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年3月4日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow于1428年出生在英国倫敦。她于1450年与Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年3月4日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marrow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English marwe, marowe ‘companion, mate’.

variants.name: Marra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Carmine, Salvatore, Enrico, Pasquale, Sal, Vincenzo, Alessandro, Gaetano, Marino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of the places so called in central and southern Italy, from marra ‘heap of stones’.

Italian, Galician, and Portuguese: from marra ‘hoe’, in Galician and Portuguese also ‘big mallet for breaking stones’ (from Latin marra), presumably a metonymic occupational name for one who made such implements or for one who used them.

variants.name: Merrow
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marrow  .
English: habitational name from Merrow in Surrey, apparently derived from Old English mearg ‘marrow, fat’, used figuratively to mean ‘fertile ground’.
Americanized form of French   Amirault   or of any of its altered forms. Compare   Meraw   and   Mero   4.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow was born in 1428, in London, England. She married Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight in 1450. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 4 March 1490, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow est née en 1428, à Londres, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight en 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1490, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow wurde 1428 in London, England geboren. Sie hat 1450 Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. März 1490 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow è nata il nel 1428 nel London, England. Lei sposato Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight nel 1450. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 4 marzo 1490, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Marrowは1428年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた。1450年にSir Richard Whetehill, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年3月4日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow(은)는 1428년 영국 런던에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1450년 Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 3월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow nasceu em 1428, em London, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight em 1450. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1490, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow родилась в 1428 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight в 1450 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 4 марта 1490 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Marrow nació en 1428, en London, Inglaterra. Se casó con Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight en 1450. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1490, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
